title: member-only Space/set patch on non-existent space returns updated
description: Trigger: Space/set update with only members/* paths (no name/description) for a space_id that does not exist. update_space_fully skips the existence check when name=None && description=None, runs the member INSERT against space_member (no FK to space), returns Ok(true). space_set records updated[space_id]=null — false success — and creates orphaned space_member rows. RFC 8620 §7.1 requires notFound.
